name: Kohl's Fudge Frosting
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all ingredients (except vanilla) in a saucepan.
2. Bring mixture to a boil, stirring occasionally until fully combined.
3. Boil for 2 minutes without stirring.
4. Pour the mixture into a bowl and beat until it reaches a gravy consistency, about 5 minutes.
5. Stir in the vanilla extract.
6. Spread over the cooled cake and sprinkle with nuts if desired.
Taken from: IT NEVER TURNS OUT THE SAME WAY COOKBOOK
A Collection of Recipes from the Kitchen of Joyce & Clem Kohl
